description_long: This is an adult human figure depicted in a casual urban outfit, featuring a short-sleeve shirt with a graphic design and fitted jeans. The figure has short hair and is wearing sturdy boots suitable for walking on city streets. The arms are extended horizontally, and the body is proportionate, with realistic anatomical features. The clothing appears to be made of typical fabric materials, while the boots have a more rugged, structured appearance. The figure is not carrying any visible accessories or objects, and the overall build suggests an average adult male. The surface details include visible seams and folds in the clothing, as well as subtle texturing on the boots and hair.
description: An adult person in casual attire with a short-sleeve shirt, jeans, and boots, arms extended horizontally. The figure has short hair and realistic body proportions.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the outstretched arms, short hair, and the upper surface of the shirt and jeans.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the jeans and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, jeans, and boots, as well as the back of the head.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm, and the side of the boots and jeans.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve shirt and fitted jeans with sturdy boots
